title: Contact
text:

title: Founder’s Blog
text: Every voyage begins with a dream of the sea. Cosmic Trajectories is an experiment to see how easily financial representatives can build out portfolio analysis tools in house. The idea would be to see if such a process would create a more flexible data ecosystem for boutique financial advisers and portfolio managers.

title: Founder’s Blog
text: Every voyage begins with a dream of the sea. Cosmic Trajectories is an experiment to see how easily financial representatives can build out portfolio analysis tools in house. The idea would be to see if such a process would create a more flexible data ecosystem for boutique financial advisers and portfolio managers.

title: About Cosmic Trajectories
text: Cosmic Trajectories is a graduate-level project focused on building a more streamlined and practical way for investment advisor representatives to analyze portfolios. Right now, advisors often have to juggle multiple tools—client data systems, market research platforms, and spreadsheets—just to get a full picture of a portfolio, which can be time-consuming and limiting . This project explores what it would look like to bring those pieces together into a single platform that combines user-input portfolio data with live market data from TradingView, making it easier to run analyses, generate visualizations, and produce reports in one place. The app is being developed as a modular Shiny application with a strong emphasis on clean data structure and user-specific workflows, allowing each user to manage their own portfolios while experimenting with different analytical tools . Overall, the goal of Cosmic Trajectories is not just to build a working tool, but to prototype a more efficient and flexible approach to portfolio analysis that could eventually expand into a broader ecosystem of advisor-focused financial tools.
